note.zh: 在 Claude Code 中以 Claude Fable 5（xhigh 思考配额）一次生成。原始产出把表厂品牌写成 FABLE & CIE、机芯型号 CF-500，会在 Arena 盲评中暗示模型身份；本页仅替换为中性品牌与型号（AUREL & CIE / AC-500），其余未改。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Claude Fable 5 (xhigh effort) inside Claude Code. The original output branded the watch as FABLE & CIE with calibre CF-500, which would hint at the model identity in blind Arena mode; this page only replaces those with neutral branding (AUREL & CIE / AC-500), otherwise unmodified.
